template.name: Legal Content
template.text:
Example:
Set A Blank Line

the first paragraph

/n

the second paragraph

fields.name: text
fields.label: Text
fields.description:
Select H5 as a paragraph title, and use '/n' to set a blank line between different paragraphs.
Don't edit the text in the preview, please edit the text in the right side content panel, otherwise all blank lines will be lost when saving.
